name: validate_hw_platform
full_help:
validate_hw_platform

Description: 
Validate the specified harware platform

Syntax: 
validate_hw_platform  [-verbose] [-quiet] [<file>]

Returns: 
The name of the shell file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-verbose]  Dump verbose information
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [<file>]    Xilinx Shell Archive file
              Values: Path to shell file.

Categories: 
Vitis, Platform
